purpose: Lazy-load pack metadata for grouping Tool Scenario Cards without injecting every executable schema into context.

packs.summary: Find, inspect, outline, and summarize repo context before edits.
useWhen: Task requires understanding existing repository code, docs, symbols, or structure.
avoidWhen: Task is pure conversation or only needs release/capability metadata.

packs.summary: Check workspace state, diffs, commands, and validation health.
useWhen: Task involves verification, failing tests, review, or final changed-file summaries.
avoidWhen: No files or runtime behavior are being inspected or changed.

packs.summary: Inspect and update capability/docs/release-adjacent metadata safely.
useWhen: Task touches capability registry, changelog candidates, contracts, docs, or release tracking.
avoidWhen: Task only needs source-code navigation or test execution.

packs.summary: Check SISO runtime, install, source drift, gateway, and doctor readiness.
useWhen: Task involves local runtime health, installed/canonical drift, gateway readiness, or operator diagnostics.
avoidWhen: Task is local source-only code exploration.
